name: 17q11_2_pericentric_SD
description: 17 pericentromeric SD blocks adjacent to the centromere on 17q11.1-q11.2. Composite SDs derived from many ancestral donors; contributes to mapping ambiguity near the centromere and to evolutionary acceptor sites of new duplicons.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD mosaic with multiple ~30-100 kb modules at ~94-97% identity; donor loci spread across 17p, 7q, 22q, others; resolved fully in T2T-CHM13.
